params.description:
On Apr 13, 1011 AD, the Asoka Tower was crafted with unremitting efforts of everyone, and was used to worship Buddha's Skull Sarira.

Asoka Tower is a single-story square pagoda, comprising a cover, a body, and a pedestal. It is made of sandalwood and its body is covered with a gold-gilt silver layer, decorated with crystals, agates, and other precious stones. Its body is integrally connected to the pedestal that is covered with patterns that tell the Buddha's life stories. Also, Buddha's Skull  …
